macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin edges toward $74,000 as the market stabilizes
items.summary: Bitcoin traded just below $74,000 and was up about 0.5% over the previous 24 hours, while the broader crypto market hovered around a calmer weekend tone after a volatile week. The move came as traders watched macro headlines and Bitcoin dominance stayed above 57%.

items.title: Worldcoin surges double digits after a strong 24-hour rally
items.summary: Worldcoin (WLD), the Sam Altman-linked project, gained about 11% in the past day and was one of the standout altcoin performers. The report also noted smaller but notable gains in Venice Token, Humanity, Midnight, BNB, and TON.

items.title: Crypto futures liquidations exceed $80 million amid sharp volatility
items.summary: Crypto perpetual futures saw more than $80 million in liquidations over 24 hours, underscoring continued market volatility. Bitcoin accounted for about $26.91 million of those liquidations, while HYPE shorts were also heavily affected.

items.title: BNB jumps sharply and triggers sizable liquidations
items.summary: BNB reportedly surged around 13% in a move that triggered roughly $12 million in 24-hour liquidations. The rally made BNB one of the most notable large-cap gainers in the latest market action.

items.title: Bitcoin and altcoins weaken as Middle East tensions and ceasefire hopes clash
items.summary: Crypto markets were pressured by shifting headlines around Iran and the US, with Bitcoin dropping toward $73,000 in some reports. The coverage linked the price action to broader geopolitical uncertainty rather than a crypto-specific catalyst.

items.title: US-Iran tensions intersect with crypto as reports say the US seized $1 billion in Iran crypto
items.summary: News aggregators highlighted a report that the US seized about $1 billion in Iranian crypto, framing it as part of a wider geopolitical and regulatory story. This was one of the most notable policy-adjacent crypto developments in the past day.

items.title: Vietnam considers allowing SMEs to use crypto as bank loan collateral
items.summary: Regional reporting indicated that Vietnam is exploring a framework that would let small and medium-sized enterprises use crypto as collateral for bank loans. If advanced, the proposal would mark a meaningful step in crypto-linked financial regulation.

items.title: Gravity Bridge reports a $5.4 million hack and asks validators to halt operations
items.summary: The project reportedly suffered a $5.4 million exploit and requested validator intervention to stop operations. The incident adds to a recent run of security issues across blockchain projects.

items.title: Cardano Foundation cancels 2026 summit after treasury funding vote falls short
items.summary: Cardano-related coverage said the Foundation canceled its 2026 summit after a treasury funding vote did not pass by a narrow margin. The decision is a notable governance and ecosystem-development setback for the project.

items.title: White hat exploit rescues $2 million locked in a 2016 ICO contract
items.summary: A developer reportedly helped recover about $2 million from a long-dormant ICO contract through a white-hat exploit. The case highlights ongoing remediation efforts for legacy smart-contract vulnerabilities.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
